name: Playwright Tests
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    # PERBAIKAN 1: Menggunakan menit ganjil/tidak bulat agar lolos dari antrean jam sibuk global
    - cron: "17,43 * * * *" 

jobs:
  test:
    timeout-minutes: 15
    runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
    
    # PERBAIKAN 2: Hak akses wajib agar GitHub CLI di akhir skrip bisa memperbarui status alur kerja
    permissions:
      contents: write
      actions: write

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    # PERBAIKAN 3: Mengunci Node ke 22 untuk menghindari bug silent freeze ekstraksi ZIP pada lts/*
    - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: '22'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm ci

    # PERBAIKAN 4: Mengambil angka versi bersih (tanpa teks "Version" dan spasi) agar cache valid
    - name: Get Playwright version
      id: pw-version
      run: echo "version=$(npx playwright --version | awk '{print $2}')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

    - uses: actions/cache@v4
      id: playwright-cache
      with:
        path: ~/.cache/ms-playwright
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-playwright-${{ steps.pw-version.outputs.version }}

    # PERBAIKAN 5: Matikan auto-update sistem Ubuntu agar tidak mengunci Disk I/O server
    - name: Disable Man-DB Auto-Update
      run: |
        sudo debconf-set-selections <<< "man-db man-db/auto-update boolean false"
        sudo dpkg-reconfigure man-db

    # PERBAIKAN 6: Tambahkan alokasi RAM Node.js ekstra saat mengekstrak biner Chromium
    - name: Install Playwright Browsers
      env:
        NODE_OPTIONS: "--max-old-space-size=4096"
      run: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium

    - name: Create .env file
      run: |
        touch .env
        echo "EMAIL=${{ secrets.EMAIL }}" >> .env
        echo "PASSWORD=${{ secrets.PASSWORD }}" >> .env
        echo "MAX_FUEL_PRICE=${{ vars.MAX_FUEL_PRICE }}" >> .env
        echo "MAX_CO2_PRICE=${{ vars.MAX_CO2_PRICE }}" >> .env

    - name: Run Playwright tests
      run: npx playwright test

    # PERBAIKAN 7: Perintah resmi GitHub CLI untuk mereset masa tenggang 60 hari agar tetap aktif selamanya
    - name: Anti Nonaktif Otomatis (GitHub CLI)
      if: always() # Tetap dijalankan meskipun tes Playwright Anda berhasil ataupun gagal
      env:
        GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      run: |
        gh workflow enable "Playwright Tests"
